titleStmt.title: SII 20.134: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 134. (B.K. No. 66 of 1938-39.) TADALBĀGI, JAMKHANDI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Stone beam of the Īśvara temple called Dēgula outside the village.

summary.p: This record is dated in the king's regnal year 12, Saumya, Chaitra ba, 13, Monday, Solar eclipse. The date is irregular. The cyclic year Saumya which occurred during the reign of Permāḍi coincided with A.D. 1129 and the solar eclipse in Chaitra of that year occurred on Saturday, April 20.
The inscription registers a grant of land made by Śaṁkara-bhaṭṭōpādhāya, the son of Chaṁgadēva-bhaṭṭōpādhyāya, who had obtained the gift land. The latter was the prabhu of Taddalabāge.
The grant was made for the worship and offerings of God Sōmanātha at Taddalabāge. Grants of flower-garden, oil-mill, land and money, made by the sthānas and baṇañjigas are also recorded.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī śrī
© namastuṁgaśirastuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē trailōkyanagarāraṁ
bhamūlastaṁbhāya saṁbhavē . svasti śrīmatu kaḷaturya pe
rmmārḍidēvavavarṣada 12 neya saṁmya saṁvatsarada caitra bahuḷaRead sāmya.
13 sōmavāra sūryagrahaṇadaṁdu kriṇnāveṁ
ṇī tīradali cakravarttiya paramārādhyarappa taddalabāgeya prabhu caṁgaRead kṛṣṇavēṇī.
dēvabhaṭṭōpādhyāyaru punarddhāreyaṁ haḍadu sōma(na)nā
thadēvargge yavara magaṁ saṁkarabhaṭṭōpādhyāyaru meyiga
ccina keyivoḷage biṭṭa māṇikēśvarada matta 6 stānaṁgaḷu biṭṭa pū
dōṁṭavoṁdu gā(ṁ)ṇavoṁdu dēvariṁ paḍuvalu matta 6
sēnabōva viṭṭarasa mā(ṁ)nyada kōlalu biṭṭa keyi matta 10 suṁka
da gayādharanā(ṁ)yakadēvara dhūpa suṁkada staḷadalli va
risakkakuḍuva paṇaṁ 12 stāna baṇaṁjigaru biṭṭaraṁtida bhaṁḍa su
ttuyaṁ mēge hoṁge vīsa muṟu . I dharmmavaṁ pratipāḷisu
va mahāprabhu vikramādityayarasaṁge śrī
yuṁ . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdhara
saṣṭivarṣasahasrāṇāṁ viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ .
© yī dharmmavaṁ pratipāḷisidavargge vāraṇāsiya
lu sahaśra kavileyaṁ dānaṁ māḍida phala Idanaḷi
davaru pāraṇāsiyalu sāsira kavileya koṁda dō
ṣa
Digital edition of SII 20.134 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
